prompt: Add a new row above "Physical Body" titled "Technology" with subcategories of "Innovation" and "Progress".
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1, a synoptic table. Insert a new row directly above the 'Physical Body' row. For this new row:
- In the 'Principle' column, add 'Technology' as the title, accompanied by a suitable icon.
- In the 'Ideal' column, add 'Innovation' and 'Progress' as distinct subcategories, each on a separate line.
Ensure the new row's design, including font, layout, and background, matches the existing table rows seamlessly.
objects: The original synoptic table header: Principle, Ideal, Nourishment, Price, Activity.
The original "SYNOPTIC TABLE" text label on the left.
The 'Spirit' row with its content and icon.
The 'Soul' row with its content and icon.
The 'Intellect' row with its content and icon.
The 'Heart' row with its content and icon.
The 'Will' row with its content and icon.
A new table row inserted directly above the 'Physical Body' row.
'Technology' text in the 'Principle' column of the new row.
A suitable icon accompanying 'Technology' in the 'Principle' column of the new row.
'Innovation' text in the 'Ideal' column of the new row.
'Progress' text on a separate line below 'Innovation' in the 'Ideal' column of the new row.
The 'Physical Body' row, now positioned below the new row, with its original content and icon.
